results.rendered_html:
anārata a.
1 Not ceasing or stopping, continuous, uninterrupted.
2 Eternal.
— taṃ
1 Continuity.
2 Absolute non-entity (atyaṃtābhāva).
— adv. Continuously, always; eternally; anārataṃ tena padeṣu laṃbhitāḥ  Ki. 1. 15 , 40.
